meta.title: The Ledger — Conversion Copy Studio · v31 Chronicle
meta.description: Conversion-based copy for the modern brand. Template concept.

sections.note: refined word nerd, at your service

sections.h: Ready to get booked with words that sound like you — on your best day?
sections.hand: you don't need louder. you need truer.

cards.d: Every page written to carry its weight — from the headline that stops the scroll to the button that gets clicked. Placeholder service copy.
Email sequences and sales pages for launches that read like stories and close like clockwork.
Templates and mini-courses for founders who write their own — with an editor looking over their shoulder.

sections.hand: enneagram 9w8 · chronic rewriter · your copy's best friend
sections.p: Placeholder bio: a former journalist who fell for conversion copy, our founder built The Ledger on one belief — you don't need to sacrifice quality to sell well. Every sentence earns its place, or it goes.

sections.h: Quality that reads beautifully — and converts anyway.
